title: PRD Structure
definition: Standard sections: problem, goals, stories, requirements, metrics, risks.
whenToUse: Handing off discovery to engineering for build.
interviewPrompts: Walk me through how you'd write a PRD for X.

title: User Stories
definition: As a [user], I want [action], so that [outcome] — capturing user value in buildable units.

title: Acceptance Criteria
definition: Testable conditions that define when a user story is complete.
whenToUse: Every user story before development starts.
frameworkSteps: Cover happy path and edge cases
officeUse: Definition of done and QA test plans.
